title: taraxacum cereum
intro: Taraxacum cereum, also known as yellow dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum cereum include its ability to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, Taraxacum cereum is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote overall well-being.
